title: Ethereum Blockchain Wallet Behavior Analysis (ChainSense)
description: Engineered 9 behavioral features from 109,000+ raw Ethereum transactions, clustering 1,000 wallet addresses using HDBSCAN with PCA and LDA dimensionality reduction.

title: Phone Jail Cell Build Project (LockedIn)
description: Collaborated on an 11-person team to design a phone-jail combining physical hardware and Arduino C++ firmware with a web-based task management system.

title: Rubik's Cube Solve Time Analyzer (SolveStat)
description: Built a full-stack web application using React and FastAPI to parse and analyze csTimer CSV files with 10,000+ solve times and interactive Chart.js visualizations.

title: Foreign Exchange Market Trading Analysis
description: Analyzed 500+ Forex trades on Major Forex Pairs using structured Excel trading journals, applying Wyckoff theory and risk management frameworks.

title: Data Visualization Portfolio Site
description: Built a personal portfolio website from scratch using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript with dark mode, dynamic navigation, and GitHub API integration.

title: Western Blot Protein Analysis
description: Quantified Western blot band intensities across 150+ protein samples using ImageJ-based image analysis to generate quantitative experimental datasets.

title: SQL Database Management Project
description: Designed and queried relational databases using MySQL and PostgreSQL for data analysis and reporting tasks.

title: Machine Learning Classification Project
description: Built classification models using Scikit-learn with feature engineering, cross-validation, and performance evaluation on real-world datasets.

title: Data Analysis with Pandas
description: Performed exploratory data analysis and visualization using pandas, NumPy, and Matplotlib on structured datasets.

title: Interactive Dashboard with Plotly
description: Created interactive data visualizations and dashboards using Plotly and FastAPI to display real-time analytics.

title: Science Tutoring Curriculum Development
description: Designed lesson material and taught natural science and computer science to grades 8-10 students through weekly online classes of approximately 15 students.

title: Competitive Cubing Performance Tracker
description: Tracked and analyzed competitive Rubik's Cube solving performance across WCA competitions, earning 7 silver and 7 bronze medals.
